expectations.text: Output file is a .md file in the outputs directory

expectations.evidence: ## Timeline present as a table (T+offset format)

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Root Cause section
expectations.evidence: ## Root Cause present with mechanism explanation
No dedicated ## Impact section. Impact is mentioned in Summary but not as a structured section with Systems/Users/Duration/Data breakdown

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Resolution section with at least one checklist item
Document contains an ## Action Items section with at least one checklist item
expectations.evidence: Has ## Action Items as a table with owners/priority, but uses table rows instead of checkbox format (- [ ] items). Different format from the skill's template.

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Lessons Learned section
Severity field uses the defined scale (Critical, High, Medium, or Low) — not P0/P1 or other formats
expectations.evidence: **Severity**: P1 — Customer-facing, revenue-impacting. Uses P-level notation instead of the Critical/High/Medium/Low scale

expectations.text: Root cause explains the mechanism (not just names the missing var — should mention vault_secrets removal and why .env masked it)
expectations.evidence: Root cause explains the vault_secrets() removal, why .env masked it, and the trigger condition
